user_goal: 保持线上 10/10 完成率，优先寻找不会退化成 cost_first 的小幅改进。

output_contract.description: Candidate solver must expose the configured entrypoint and return a judge-compatible result.
output_contract.dependency_policy: solver.py should remain self-contained unless this contract explicitly allows dependencies.

evaluator.adapter_name: evaluate(candidate_path: str, dataset_path: str | None = None) -> dict
evaluator.rubric: 保持线上 10/10 完成率，优先寻找不会退化成 cost_first 的小幅改进。

hard_constraints: candidate output must match the declared output contract
metrics.accept_rule: hard_pass == true and primary metric improves over baseline
